Case Study 01

Shiseido

E-Commerce Operations Across 4 Luxury Beauty Brands

The Problem

  • —4 luxury brands — Shiseido, NARS, Drunk Elephant, and Clé de Peau Beauté — each on separate promotional calendars with distinct creative guidelines
  • —Every campaign required tight coordination across cross-functional teams, with no tolerance for handoff gaps
  • —A single missed step meant a visible error live on a luxury retail site — multiplied across all four brands at once

The Solution

  • —Built a standardized JIRA workflow covering briefs, asset handoffs, inventory checks, and QA sign-off for every promotion
  • —Ran daily proactive QA across all four live sites — catching layout and functional breaks before customers saw them
  • —Centralized paid search, paid social, and Rakuten affiliate tracking into shared trafficking sheets — one source of truth across all channels
  • —Used Google Analytics to monitor campaign performance by promotional page and surface underperforming placements in real time
Tools: JIRA Airtable Salesforce Commerce Cloud GA4 Power BI Rakuten

The Impact

4

Brands Run
Simultaneously

40+

Campaigns
Delivered

  • —Daily QA reduced time between a bug appearing and a fix being deployed — issues caught before customers saw them
  • —Inventory checks built into every launch prevented stockouts discovered mid-campaign
  • —Same workflow managed 5+ product launches requiring coordinated asset trafficking, inventory pre-allocation, and QA sign-off

Case Study 02

Digital Main Street

Taking 45+ Small Businesses from Zero to Digital

The Problem

  • —Pipeline of 45+ small businesses across wildly different industries — many run by owners with no technical background
  • —Fixed window to build, launch, and hand over fully independent digital operations for each client
  • —Goal: no ongoing dependency — every client had to leave fully capable of running their own store

The Solution

  • —Built complete storefronts on Shopify, Square, or Ecwid — POS integration, shipping, inventory, and checkout flows tailored to each specific business
  • —Ran SEO audits and implemented on-page fixes before launch so organic traffic could begin from day one
  • —Designed individualized one-on-one training for each client — built from scratch around their platform, product catalog, and comfort level:
    • ·Reading and interpreting analytics dashboards
    • ·Setting up and managing paid social campaigns
    • ·Managing live inventory and product updates
    • ·Writing SEO-optimized product content
  • —No two sessions covered the same ground — success meant full independent operation after program completion
Tools: Shopify Square Ecwid SEMrush HubSpot CRM Meta & Google Ads

The Impact

45+

Storefronts
Launched

9

Month Program
Timeline

  • —Every client graduated able to manage their store, marketing, and analytics independently
  • —Tracked end-to-end through HubSpot from intake to handoff — no ongoing dependency after program completion

Website Redesign

Graphic Design

Case Study 03

All Paws Rescue

Nonprofit Rebrand, UX Redesign & Social Rebuild

Visit Site ↗

The Problem

  • —Personal entry point — I had been fostering cats for All Paws since 2021, and the more involved I got, the clearer it became the org's digital presence didn't reflect the care behind the work
  • —No consistent visual identity — fonts, colours, and graphic quality shifted from post to post and page to page across every channel
  • —Instagram and Facebook had gone largely dormant, with no posting cadence and no presence to drive adoption awareness or inquiries
  • —The adoption application flow had redundant steps actively working against the org's own goal — getting animals into homes

The Solution

  • —Audited the full adoption journey and rebuilt the website flow — shorter path from "I want to adopt" to a submitted application
  • —Built a complete visual identity from scratch: typography system, colour palette, and reusable template library
  • —Applied the identity consistently across the website, print materials, and every social channel
  • —Built All Paws' TikTok from scratch and developed a structured content calendar spanning Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok — consistent voice and posting rhythm across all three
Tools: Adobe Creative Suite Canva Meta Business Suite

The Impact

3

Social Platforms
IG, FB + TikTok

2yr+

Volunteer
Commitment

  • —Application flow had fewer abandonment points following the redesign
  • —Org went from a dormant, inconsistent Instagram to an active page with a repeatable content system the team could sustain independently
